name: Maple Mousse
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the gelatin in cold water.
2. Beat 4 egg yolks until frothy.
3. Add maple syrup and mix well.
4. Add the softened gelatin to the mixture.
5. Pour into a saucepan and cook over very low heat, stirring constantly, for about 10 minutes (until quite thick).
6. Cool completely.
7. Beat egg whites; add cream of tartar and beat until stiff peaks form.
8. Fold together the gelatin mixture, egg whites, and whipped cream.
9. Spoon into dessert dishes and serve. May be sprinkled with nuts if desired.
